# CLKComplicationTemplateCircularSmallStackText

**Class**

A template for displaying two text strings stacked on top of each other.

## Declaration

```swift
class CLKComplicationTemplateCircularSmallStackText
```

## Overview

This template belongs to the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationFamily/circularSmall] family.



## Creating the Template

- **init(line1TextProvider:line2TextProvider:)**: Creates a new template that has two lines of text.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **line1TextProvider**: The text to display on the top line of the complication.
- **line2TextProvider**: The text to display on the bottom line of the complication.

## Text templates

- **CLKComplicationTemplateCircularSmallRingText**: A template for displaying a short text string encircled by a configurable progress ring.
- **CLKComplicationTemplateCircularSmallSimpleText**: A template for displaying a short text string.

## Inherits From

- CLKComplicationTemplate

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
